step_rationale: Lysosomal protease; collagen/elastin degradation in plaque; myocardial proteolysis.
mechanism: Cathepsin L is a lysosomal cysteine protease that degrades atherosclerotic plaque extracellular matrix and also contributes to cardiomyocyte proteolysis during ischemia.

references.title: Cysteinyl cathepsins in cardiovascular diseases.
references.journal: Biochimica et biophysica acta. Proteins and proteomics

references.title: Increased Circulating Cathepsin L in Patients with Coronary Artery Disease.
Degradation of troponin I in serum or plasma: mechanisms, and analytical and clinical implications.
